title: The Lonely Man with the Ghost Machine
original_title: The Lonely Man with the Ghost Machine
overview: After a global catastrophe, the last man on Earth finds himself questioning his purpose and sanity as both his deceased wife and a mysterious stranger confront him with his past, his present, and whatever future might remain in the wastes of a dead world.
